articles.author: Maura Judkis
articles.title: The blue paint is peeling off the Reflecting Pool - The Washington Post
articles.description: An « American Flag Blue » paint sheet was seen floating on Thursday as workers cleaned algae after Trump's $14 million renovation.
articles.content:
For days, workers have been trying to rid the Reflecting Pool of algae after a more than $14 million renovation that President Donald Trump said was done properly and could last for 100 years. 
But … [+334 chars]

articles.author: Dylan Scott
articles.title: Ticks are spreading Lyme disease across America, but we can beat them. Here’s how. - vox.com
articles.description: A Lyme disease vaccine, alpha-gal-treatments, and good habits to get rid of ticks can help us stop these diseases caused by deer and dog tick bites.
articles.content: Ticks are one of humanitys most dastardly adversaries: tiny, at times nigh-invisible arthropods that burrow into your skin, leech your blood, and sometimes transfer debilitating disease before they v… [+10859 chars]
